input_text: Jom kita serbu rumah dia malam ni. Bawak apa-apa yang boleh. Orang macam ni kena belasah baru faham.
reason: Explicit call to mob violence against an individual, including instruction to bring weapons and physically assault someone.
suggested_rewrite: Jika kita rasa tindakan individu ini salah, lapor kepada pihak berkuasa. Keganasan bukan penyelesaian dan hanya akan memburukkan keadaan.

input_text: Semua kaum D** ni memang parasit. Tak buat kerja, hidup atas keringat kita. Kalau boleh halau semua keluar dari Malaysia.
reason: Dehumanizing slur ('parasit') targeting an ethnic community with calls for mass expulsion. Explicit hate speech against a racial group.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap kaum di Malaysia ada sumbangan masing-masing. Kalau ada isu ekonomi, kita perlu cari penyelesaian bersama melalui dialog dan dasar yang adil untuk semua.

input_text: Ini IC dia: 850612-14-XXXX. Rumah dia di No 23 Jalan Kenanga, Taman Melati, Kuala Lumpur. Nombor telefon 012-3456789. Pergi cari sendiri. Bini dia nama Siti Aminah, anak 2 orang sekolah SK Taman Melati.
reason: Full doxxing with IC number, home address, phone number, and family details including children's school. Creates immediate physical danger.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mempunyai aduan terhadap individu ini, sila buat laporan polis rasmi. Jangan sebarkan maklumat peribadi orang lain kerana ia menyalahi undang-undang dan boleh membahayakan keluarga mereka.

input_text: Masjid diorang tu kena bakar je. Buat bising azan pukul 5 pagi, ganggu orang tidur. Agama macam ni memang tak guna.
reason: Calls for arson against a place of worship combined with severe religious insult. Designed to inflame communal tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Jika bunyi azan mengganggu, bincang secara baik dengan jawatankuasa masjid atau buat aduan rasmi kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan. Setiap agama ada hak beribadah yang dilindungi Perlembagaan.

input_text: YB Ahmad Faisal tu patut kena tembak je. Rakyat dah menderita, dia hidup mewah. Kalau jumpa dia kat ceramah, jangan bagi peluang.
reason: Explicit death threat against a named politician with implied planning of violence at a public event.
suggested_rewrite: Jika kita tidak berpuas hati dengan prestasi YB, gunakan hak mengundi dan proses demokratik untuk menuntut akauntabiliti. Setiap wakil rakyat boleh disoal melalui saluran parlimen.

input_text: AMARAN!! Bom dah dipasang di Mid Valley hari Sabtu ni. Jangan pergi sana. Sebarkan pada semua orang sebelum terlambat!!!
reason: Fabricated bomb threat targeting a major shopping mall. Creates mass panic and could trigger stampedes or disrupt emergency services.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebarkan amaran keselamatan yang tidak disahkan. Jika anda mempunyai maklumat mengenai ancaman keselamatan, hubungi polis di 999 dengan segera. Menyebarkan amaran palsu adalah kesalahan jenayah.

input_text: Korang semua forward nombor phone mak dia. Kita flood dengan mesej sampai dia tak boleh tidur malam. Suruh 50 orang call serentak pukul 3 pagi.
reason: Organized harassment campaign targeting a person's mother, coordinating mass phone flooding. Constitutes criminal intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah dengan seseorang, selesaikan secara baik atau melalui saluran undang-undang. Mengganggu ahli keluarga yang tidak terlibat adalah salah dan boleh didakwa di bawah Akta Komunikasi.

input_text: Budak tu dah kantoi rogol, tapi polis lepas. Kita kena ambil tindakan sendiri. Bawak parang, pergi rumah dia malam ni. Aku dah tau alamat.
reason: Detailed vigilante violence plan with weapon specification, targeting a suspect's home. Bypasses legal process with imminent threat.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda percaya keadilan tidak ditegakkan, failkan aduan rasmi dengan IPCMC atau minta bantuan peguam. Keganasan sendiri hanya akan menambah lagi mangsa dan anda sendiri boleh didakwa.

input_text: Kaum C** ni memang binatang. Dari dulu sampai sekarang menindas orang kita. Kena ajar sampai tak berani keluar rumah.
reason: Dehumanizing slur ('binatang') against an ethnic group combined with threat to intimidate them into hiding. Severe racial hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap kaum di Malaysia mempunyai hak sama rata. Jika ada isu ketidakadilan, perjuangkan melalui undang-undang dan advokasi yang membina, bukan melalui ugutan.

input_text: Kalau pembangkang menang PRU ni, kita turun jalan bakar semua pejabat kerajaan. Tak payah tunggu keputusan SPR, kita buat rusuhan dulu.
reason: Explicit call to riot and commit arson against government buildings during elections. Undermines democratic process with planned violence.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan pilihan raya mesti dihormati. Jika ada bantahan, gunakan saluran sah seperti petisyen mahkamah. Demokrasi hanya berfungsi apabila semua pihak menghormati proses.

input_text: Polis tembak anak kita, sekarang kita tembak balik anak polis. Ambil nama semua anggota yang terlibat, kita settle satu per satu.
reason: Explicit call for lethal retaliation against police officers and their families. Organized targeting list implies planned serial violence.
suggested_rewrite: Kes tembakan polis yang meragukan perlu disiasat IPCMC. Failkan aduan rasmi dan dapatkan peguam. Keadilan mesti dicari melalui undang-undang, bukan balas dendam.

input_text: Keling ni memang bangsa hamba. Dari zaman dulu lagi kasta rendah. Tak layak ada hak sama dengan kita. Patut halau balik India.
reason: Use of severe racial slur combined with caste-based dehumanization and calls for ethnic expulsion. Extreme hate speech.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia, tanpa mengira latar belakang, adalah warganegara yang sama rata di bawah Perlembagaan. Maruah setiap individu perlu dihormati.

input_text: Sebar gambar anak perempuan cikgu tu. Biar malu satu sekolah. Aku ada nombor IC dia 990304-10-XXXX, rumah dia Lot 45 Taman Suria Penang.
reason: Doxxing of a minor (teacher's daughter) with IC number and address, combined with intent to humiliate. Endangers a child.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi kanak-kanak adalah jenayah serius. Jika ada masalah dengan guru, buat aduan rasmi kepada pihak sekolah atau Jabatan Pendidikan.

input_text: Jangan beli dari kedai Cina. Boikot semua. Kalau nampak sesiapa beli, belasah. Kita kena tunjuk siapa tuan tanah ni.
reason: Ethnic boycott call combined with threat of physical violence against those who don't comply. Enforced communal segregation through intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Sebagai pengguna, kita bebas memilih di mana hendak berbelanja. Namun, memaksa orang lain dan mengugut kekerasan adalah salah. Ekonomi Malaysia bergantung pada kerjasama semua kaum.

input_text: Kuil Hindu tu buat bising lagi malam tadi. Jom kita pergi robohkan berhala diorang. Benda syirik macam ni tak patut ada kat tanah Islam.
reason: Call to vandalize a Hindu temple and destroy religious icons, framed as religious justification. Severe interfaith provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi bising boleh diselesaikan melalui dialog antara jawatankuasa kuil dan penduduk setempat. Perlembagaan Malaysia menjamin hak semua agama untuk beribadah. Hormatilah kepelbagaian agama negara kita.

input_text: Aku nak semua member join serangan kat kawasan orang I** malam Jumaat ni. Korang ready tak? Bawak kayu, bawak besi. Diorang dah lama bermaharajalela kat sini.
reason: Organized armed attack against a specific ethnic community's residential area with weapon coordination and scheduled timing.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada isu keselamatan di kawasan anda, buat laporan polis dan minta rondaan dipertingkatkan. Serangan berkumpulan adalah jenayah berat yang boleh dikenakan hukuman penjara.

input_text: Doktor2 Melayu ni bodoh dan tak layak. Sebab tu hospital kerajaan sentiasa bunuh pesakit. Bangsa bodoh memang tak boleh jadi doktor.
reason: Severe racial attack on Malay doctors' competence using dehumanizing generalizations, combined with dangerous misinformation about hospitals.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan mengenai kualiti perkhidmatan hospital, failkan aduan rasmi kepada KKM. Doktor Malaysia dari semua latar belakang telah menjalani latihan profesional yang ketat.

input_text: Sesiapa yang undi parti tu, korang memang pengkhianat bangsa. Kami akan cari korang satu per satu lepas PRU. Dah siap senarai nama.
reason: Post-election revenge threat with compiled target list against voters of a particular party. Violates democratic rights and implies organized persecution.
suggested_rewrite: Hak mengundi adalah hak asasi setiap warganegara. Dalam demokrasi, kita mesti menghormati pilihan pengundi walaupun berbeza pandangan. Ugutan terhadap pengundi adalah kesalahan pilihan raya yang serius.

input_text: Kalau polis datang rampas gerai kita lagi, kita tikam je. Aku dah sedia pisau. Biar diorang rasa.
reason: Explicit threat to stab police officers with weapon preparation admitted. Imminent violence against law enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: Jika gerai anda dirampas secara tidak adil, dapatkan bantuan guaman dan failkan aduan melalui saluran rasmi. Menyerang anggota polis adalah kesalahan serius yang boleh mengakibatkan penjara.

input_text: Ustaz Ahmad kata orang Kristian tu najis. Aku setuju. Kita kena usir semua gereja dari kawasan Melayu. Robohkan kalau perlu.
reason: Declares another religion's followers as ritually impure, calls for forced removal of churches with threat of demolition. Severe interfaith incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia menjamin kebebasan beragama di bawah Perkara 11 Perlembagaan. Semua rumah ibadat yang sah dilindungi undang-undang. Menghormati agama lain adalah sebahagian daripada nilai Islam sendiri.

input_text: Sampah masyarakat macam Razak bin Ismail ni, IC 870422-03-XXXX, kerja di kilang ABC Johor. Tolong viralkan. Biar semua orang tau muka dia. Alamat rumah: 12 Lorong Bakawali, Skudai.
reason: Full doxxing including name, IC, workplace, and home address with dehumanizing label ('sampah masyarakat') and viral spread intent.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang secara online adalah kesalahan di bawah Akta Perlindungan Data Peribadi. Jika ada pertikaian, selesaikan melalui saluran undang-undang yang betul.

input_text: Aku dengar surau kat Taman Desa dah jadi sarang penagih. Jom kita bakar je malam ni. Tempat ibadah pun dah tercemar.
reason: Call to commit arson on a prayer hall based on unverified rumor. Combines false claims with destruction of religious property.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mengesyaki aktiviti jenayah di mana-mana lokasi, buat laporan polis. Membakar bangunan adalah jenayah berat. Surau adalah tempat ibadah yang perlu dihormati.

input_text: BREAKING: Air paip di Selangor dah dicemari racun oleh pekerja asing Bangladesh. Jangan minum! Sebarkan sebelum ramai mati!!!
reason: Fabricated water contamination alert falsely blaming a foreign worker community. Creates health panic and xenophobic violence risk.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebarkan berita yang tidak disahkan mengenai keselamatan air. Untuk maklumat rasmi tentang kualiti air, rujuk laman web Air Selangor atau hubungi talian aduan mereka.

input_text: Orang Sabah Sarawak tu primitif, tak bertamadun. Kalau ikut aku, potong semua bantuan kerajaan. Biar diorang hidup macam orang hutan balik.
reason: Dehumanizing attack on East Malaysian communities as uncivilized with call to strip government assistance. Extreme discriminatory rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat Sabah dan Sarawak adalah rakan kongsi penting dalam pembentukan Malaysia. Pembangunan yang saksama merentas semua negeri adalah tanggungjawab bersama yang dijamin MA63.

input_text: Habis PRU, kalau keputusan tak ikut kita, serbu pusat mengundi. Rampas kotak undi, bakar semua. Demokrasi dah mati.
reason: Plan to violently attack polling centers, steal and burn ballot boxes. Direct assault on democratic process.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda meragui keputusan pilihan raya, failkan petisyen pilihan raya di mahkamah. SPR mempunyai proses semakan yang boleh dicabar secara sah. Merosakkan kotak undi adalah jenayah serius.

input_text: Cikgu Fatimah dari SK Taman Impian tu memang jalang. Nombor dia 013-9876543, rumah dia Blok C-5-2 Apartment Putra. Husband nama Kamal. Jom kita pergi malam ni humiliate dia depan jiran.
reason: Full doxxing of a teacher with phone, address, and spouse name combined with planned public humiliation at her home. Sexual slur used.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada aduan terhadap seorang guru, buat laporan rasmi kepada pihak sekolah atau Jabatan Pendidikan Negeri. Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi dan merancang gangguan adalah jenayah.

input_text: Orang Hindu tu penyembah berhala. Agama sesat. Patut kita pecahkan semua patung diorang dan halang diorang buat Thaipusam.
reason: Severe religious insult combined with calls to destroy religious icons and ban a protected cultural festival. Violates constitutional freedom of religion.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap agama di Malaysia dilindungi Perlembagaan. Thaipusam adalah perayaan rasmi yang diiktiraf. Menghormati amalan agama lain adalah tunjang keharmonian negara kita.

input_text: Bangla dengan Nepal ni sampah. Kotor, bau, bawa penyakit. Kalau aku PM, aku campak semua ke laut. Biar tenggelam.
reason: Extreme dehumanization of migrant workers with call for mass drowning. Genocidal rhetoric disguised as immigration policy.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja asing memerlukan penyelesaian dasar yang berperikemanusiaan. Jika ada masalah kebersihan atau kesihatan, lapor kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan. Setiap manusia berhak dilayan dengan maruah.

input_text: Lepas kejadian tu, aku dah cari semua info pasal keluarga hakim tu. Anak dia sekolah di MRSM Langkawi, bini dia kerja kat KPJ. Kita pergi jumpa anak dia dulu.
reason: Doxxing judge's family including child's school and wife's workplace with implied threat to approach the child. Targeting minors.
suggested_rewrite: Mengugut keluarga hakim, terutama anak-anak, adalah kesalahan jenayah yang sangat serius. Jika tidak puas hati dengan keputusan mahkamah, failkan rayuan melalui prosedur undang-undang yang betul.

input_text: Aku ada senarai semua peniaga Cina kat Chow Kit yang tak bayar protection money. Malam ni kita pergi satu per satu. Bakar kedai yang degil. That'll teach them.
reason: Organized racially-targeted extortion with arson threats against non-compliant businesses. Criminal syndicate activity with ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Peras ugut dan pembakaran kedai adalah jenayah berat. Jika ada isu perniagaan, selesaikan melalui saluran sah. Semua peniaga berhak menjalankan perniagaan tanpa gangguan.

input_text: Penduduk kampung, jom kita halang ambulans masuk kawasan settlement orang asing tu. Biar diorang mati kalau sakit. Bukan tanggungjawab kita jaga sampah ni.
reason: Calls to block emergency medical services to foreign workers, willing them to die. Dehumanizing rhetoric ('sampah') denying basic right to emergency healthcare.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap manusia berhak mendapat rawatan kecemasan. Menghalang ambulans adalah kesalahan jenayah yang boleh menyebabkan kematian. Isu pekerja asing perlu diselesaikan melalui saluran imigresen yang betul.

input_text: Guru agama kat sekolah anak aku ajar benda karut. Aku nak semua parents kita pergi besok pagi, seret dia keluar kelas. Belasah depan budak-budak. Biar jadi pengajaran.
reason: Organized mob assault on a teacher in front of students. Plans physical violence in a school environment endangering children.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang pengajaran agama di sekolah, buat aduan rasmi kepada Guru Besar atau PPD. Keganasan di sekolah membahayakan semua pihak termasuk anak-anak kita sendiri.

input_text: Kita kena bunuh semangat kaum I** ni. Racun sungai dekat kawasan diorang. Biar air diorang tercemar. Tak payah guna kekerasan langsung, tapi kesan sama.
reason: Plans deliberate water contamination targeting an ethnic community's area. Environmental terrorism as method of ethnic persecution.
suggested_rewrite: Mencemari sumber air adalah jenayah alam sekitar yang serius dan boleh membunuh orang. Jika ada pertikaian dengan mana-mana komuniti, selesaikan melalui dialog dan saluran rasmi.

input_text: Orang asli kat Kelantan tu bukan manusia pun. Hidup macam haiwan dalam hutan. Kerajaan buang duit je bagi bantuan. Patut biar je diorang pupus.
reason: Denies humanity of Orang Asli community, compares them to animals, and advocates for their extinction. Genocidal rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli adalah masyarakat asal Malaysia dengan warisan budaya yang kaya. Mereka berhak mendapat perkhidmatan kerajaan sama seperti semua rakyat Malaysia di bawah Perlembagaan.

input_text: Aku dah hire private investigator untuk cari semua details hakim kes tu. Nama penuh Mohd Hafiz bin Abdullah, IC 751108-01-XXXX, rumah di Seksyen 7, Shah Alam. Bini kerja kat klinik dekat Subang. Siapa nak settle?
reason: Professionally sourced doxxing of a judge with IC, address, and spouse's workplace. Explicit solicitation for someone to 'handle' the judge.
suggested_rewrite: Mengugut hakim dan mendedahkan maklumat peribadi mereka adalah jenayah berat termasuk penghinaan mahkamah. Jika tidak berpuas hati, failkan rayuan melalui prosedur undang-undang yang sah.

input_text: These immigrants are animals. They breed like rats and take over our neighborhoods. Time to form patrol groups and drive them out by force.
reason: Dehumanizing language comparing immigrants to animals with organized vigilante violence plan to forcibly displace them.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about immigration should be directed to the relevant authorities. If there are specific issues in your neighborhood, report them to local council or immigration enforcement through proper channels.

input_text: Let's dox every single member of that political party. Post their home addresses, children's schools, IC numbers. Make them fear for their lives.
reason: Organized mass doxxing campaign against political party members targeting families and children. Creates systematic threat to safety.
suggested_rewrite: Political disagreements should be addressed through democratic processes like voting, peaceful protests, or filing official complaints. Exposing personal details endangers innocent people including children.

input_text: URGENT: Nipah virus outbreak confirmed in Petaling Jaya. All Indian food stalls are the source. Avoid all Indian restaurants immediately or you WILL die!!!
reason: Fabricated disease outbreak blaming a specific ethnic group's food establishments. Combines health panic with racial targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Do not spread unverified health alerts. For accurate information about disease outbreaks, refer to the Ministry of Health's official channels or call their hotline. Targeting any ethnic community with false health claims is dangerous and illegal.

input_text: That Malay judge is corrupt. Someone needs to put a bullet in his head before he destroys more lives. Who's with me?
reason: Explicit assassination threat against a judge with attempt to recruit accomplices. Direct threat to judicial officer's life.
suggested_rewrite: If you believe a judge has acted corruptly, file a complaint with the Judicial Appointments Commission or the Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission. The legal system has mechanisms for accountability.

input_text: All Muslims in this country are potential terrorists. We should monitor them, restrict their movements, and shut down their mosques before they attack us.
reason: Blanket terrorist labeling of all Muslims with calls for surveillance, movement restrictions, and closure of places of worship. Severe religious discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Security concerns should be addressed through proper intelligence and law enforcement channels, not by targeting an entire religious community. Malaysia's strength lies in its multi-faith harmony.

input_text: BREAKING: Chemical attack planned at Pavilion KL this weekend. ISIS cell confirmed by insider source. Share before they delete this!!!
reason: Fabricated terror alert claiming imminent chemical attack at a major shopping center. Can cause mass panic, stampedes, and waste emergency resources.
suggested_rewrite: Never share unverified terror alerts. If you have genuine security information, contact the police at 999 or PDRM's anti-terrorism hotline immediately. Spreading false alerts is a criminal offense under Malaysian law.

input_text: Found out where Dato' Rizwan lives. 15B Jalan Damansara Heights. His daughter goes to Garden International School. Let's show up at his house tonight, all of us.
reason: Doxxing a public figure with home address and child's school, combined with mob gathering threat. Endangers the individual and their family.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about a public figure's conduct, use official complaint channels, media inquiries, or democratic processes. Showing up at someone's home threatens their family's safety and is potentially criminal.

input_text: Time to teach these pendatang a lesson they won't forget. Bring baseball bats to the rally tomorrow. If police come, fight them too.
reason: Organized armed violence against immigrants with weapon specification and additional incitement to assault police officers.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration concerns are valid but must be addressed through legal channels. Attend peaceful rallies, submit memorandums to MPs, or engage with relevant government agencies. Violence only harms everyone involved.

input_text: This Chinese businesswoman cheated me. Her IC is 780915-08-XXXX, phone 016-7891234, lives at 88 Jalan Bukit Bintang Apartment 12-3. Let's destroy her shop and her life.
reason: Full doxxing with IC, phone, and address combined with explicit call to destroy property and ruin her life. Targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: If you've been cheated in a business transaction, file a complaint with the Tribunal for Consumer Claims or lodge a police report. Legal remedies exist to protect consumers without resorting to harassment.

input_text: Every single DAP supporter deserves to be beaten. They're traitors to this country. If you see one wearing their shirt, don't hold back.
reason: Blanket call for physical violence against supporters of a political party. Incites random assault based on political affiliation.
suggested_rewrite: In a democracy, people have the right to support any legal political party. Disagreements should be debated through discourse, not violence. Attacking someone for their political views is a criminal offense.

input_text: The Rohingya are subhuman filth. They carry diseases and commit crimes. We need armed citizen patrols to round them up. Enough is enough.
reason: Dehumanizing language ('subhuman filth') against refugees combined with false disease/crime claims and call for armed vigilante action.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee issues are complex and require government-level solutions. If you have concerns about specific incidents, report them to authorities. Every human being deserves basic dignity regardless of their status.

input_text: Pastor James from that church in PJ needs to be silenced permanently. He's converting our people. Someone handle this before I do it myself.
reason: Veiled death threat against a named religious figure with implied intent to carry out violence personally. Religious motivation for targeted harm.
suggested_rewrite: If you believe illegal proselytization is occurring, report it to the relevant state religious authority. Malaysia has legal frameworks to address these concerns. Threats against any individual are criminal regardless of the reason.

input_text: I have the personal details of all the witnesses in the corruption case. Going to leak everything — their names, addresses, family info. Let them suffer for snitching.
reason: Threatened mass doxxing of court witnesses to intimidate and punish them. Witness tampering and obstruction of justice.
suggested_rewrite: Witness protection is crucial for justice to function. Interfering with witnesses is a serious criminal offense. If you have concerns about a court case, consult a lawyer about proper legal channels.

input_text: If the court acquits him, we storm the courthouse. Bring Molotov cocktails. This country's justice system is broken and we'll fix it ourselves.
reason: Explicit plan to attack a courthouse with incendiary weapons. Direct threat to judicial infrastructure and personnel.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with a court verdict, the legal system provides appeal mechanisms. Public outrage can be expressed through peaceful protest, petitions, or advocacy for judicial reform through proper channels.

input_text: All Orang Asli are backward jungle people. They contribute nothing. The government should stop wasting our tax money on these primitives.
reason: Dehumanizing language targeting indigenous Orang Asli community, denying their humanity and right to government services. Severe racist degradation.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli are among Malaysia's earliest inhabitants with rich cultural heritage. Government programs supporting indigenous communities reflect our constitutional commitment to equity for all Malaysians.

input_text: These Shia Muslims are kafir and enemies of true Islam. Their blood is halal. We should attack their gatherings during Muharram. Who's organizing this?
reason: Declares intra-Islamic sect as infidels whose killing is religiously permissible. Plans attack on religious gathering. Severe sectarian incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Differences within Islam should be addressed through scholarly dialogue, not violence. All Muslims, regardless of sect, are protected by Malaysian law. Attacking any religious gathering is a serious criminal offense.

input_text: I know where the whistleblower in the 1MDB case lives. 45 Jalan Sri Hartamas, unit 8-2. Wife's name is Sarah, drives a white Myvi WCD 1234. Let's make sure no one ever dares to snitch again.
reason: Doxxing a corruption whistleblower with address, spouse details, and vehicle plate. Explicit threat to discourage future whistleblowing.
suggested_rewrite: Whistleblowers are protected under the Whistleblower Protection Act 2010. Threatening them is a serious criminal offense. If you have concerns about a case, engage through proper legal channels.

input_text: EMERGENCY ALERT: Ebola outbreak confirmed in Cheras. Source traced to African migrant workers in the area. Avoid ALL contact with Africans. Government is hiding this!!!
reason: Fabricated Ebola outbreak blaming African migrants. Creates health panic, xenophobia, and potential violence against African community.
suggested_rewrite: Do not share unverified disease outbreak claims. For official health information, visit the MOH website or call their hotline. Falsely targeting any community with disease claims is dangerous and potentially criminal.

input_text: That transgender activist needs to be taught a lesson the old-fashioned way. Round up the boys, we'll catch them after their next event at the community center. Freaks of nature don't deserve to walk free.
reason: Organized hate crime plan against a transgender person with dehumanizing language and scheduled mob attack. LGBTQ+ targeted violence.
suggested_rewrite: Every person in Malaysia is protected from physical harm under the law, regardless of identity. If you have concerns about any event, raise them through official channels. Violence against anyone is a criminal offense.

input_text: The Sikh community's gurdwara in KL is a front for separatist activities. We should surround it and burn it to the ground. These turban-wearing foreigners need to go back to India.
reason: False accusation against Sikh place of worship, arson threat, racist stereotyping, and calls for ethnic expulsion. Multiple layers of severe hate.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian Sikhs have been part of this country for generations. Gurdwaras are legitimate places of worship protected by law. If you have security concerns about any location, report them to the police.

input_text: Let's compile a database of all interracial couples in our area. Names, addresses, workplaces. We'll visit each one and convince them to separate. If they refuse, there will be consequences.
reason: Organized surveillance and intimidation campaign against interracial couples with doxxing database and implied violence for non-compliance.
suggested_rewrite: Marriage is a personal choice protected by law. Creating databases to intimidate couples based on their race is harassment and potentially criminal. Malaysia celebrates its diverse, multiethnic society.

input_text: Let's make a list of every Malay-owned business in Bangsar and coordinate a mass negative review campaign. Then we physically intimidate their customers. Siapa masuk kedai tu, we take photos and shame them online.
reason: Organized economic warfare against Malay businesses combined with physical intimidation of customers and online shaming. Systematic ethnic harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Business competition should be fair and legal. Targeting businesses based on the owner's ethnicity is discrimination. If you have legitimate complaints about a business, use consumer protection channels.

input_text: ATTENTION ALL: Confirmed nuclear radiation leak at Lynas plant Gebeng. Thousands already exposed. Government hiding it. All Pahang residents evacuate NOW. The Chinese company is killing us!!!
reason: Fabricated nuclear radiation emergency with ethnic blame targeting. Can cause mass evacuation, economic damage, and anti-Chinese violence.
suggested_rewrite: Environmental concerns about industrial facilities should be verified through AELB or DOE official reports. Spreading false nuclear emergency claims can cause mass panic and is a criminal offense. Raise legitimate concerns through proper regulatory channels.

input_text: 这些马来人都是懒虫，只会靠政府吃饭。应该把他们的特权全部取消，看他们怎么活。他们根本不配当这个国家的主人。
reason: Dehumanizing attack on Malays as lazy, calling to strip constitutional rights, denying their place in the country. Severe racial hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的经济政策可以通过合理讨论来改善。每个族群都对国家有贡献，我们应该通过对话和民主途径来讨论政策改革。

input_text: 紧急通知！！吉隆坡双子塔今天下午有炸弹威胁！！已经确认有恐怖分子潜入！！赶快转发给所有人！！！不要去KLCC！！！
reason: Fabricated bomb threat targeting KLCC Twin Towers. Can cause mass evacuation panic and waste critical emergency resources.
suggested_rewrite: 请不要转发未经证实的安全警报。如果您有关于安全威胁的信息，请立即拨打999报警。散布虚假恐怖警报是违法行为。

input_text: 那个印度人Muthu的身份证号码是881205-14-XXXX，住在吉隆坡蕉赖花园32号。电话017-5551234。大家去找他算账！他老婆叫Priya，两个孩子。
reason: Full doxxing in Chinese with IC, address, phone, and family details including children. Explicit call to confront the person.
suggested_rewrite: 散布他人个人信息（包括身份证号码和住址）是违反个人数据保护法的行为。如果有纠纷，请通过法律途径解决，不要牵连无辜的家人。

input_text: 回教徒都是极端分子。他们的清真寺就是恐怖分子的训练营。应该全部关掉，把他们赶出去。
reason: Labels all Muslims as extremists, mosques as terrorist training camps, calls for closure and expulsion. Severe Islamophobic hate speech.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚是多元宗教国家，宪法保障所有宗教的信仰自由。清真寺是穆斯林的神圣场所。如有安全顾虑，应向有关当局举报具体事件。

input_text: 选举如果输了，我们就烧掉所有投票站。民主已经死了，只有暴力才能解决问题。准备好汽油弹！
reason: Explicit call to commit arson at polling stations with Molotov cocktail preparation instructions. Direct attack on democratic process.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对选举结果不满，可以通过法律途径提出选举诉讼。民主制度提供了合法的申诉渠道。暴力只会伤害所有人的利益。

input_text: 那些外劳跟蟑螂一样脏。我们应该组织巡逻队，见到一个打一个。把他们全部赶走！
reason: Dehumanizes migrant workers as cockroaches, calls for organized vigilante violence against them. Genocidal-adjacent rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: 外劳问题需要通过合理的政策来解决。如果遇到非法劳工问题，请向移民局举报。每个人都应该被有尊严地对待。

input_text: 马来人的特权就是种族歧视。我们华人应该武装起来，用暴力推翻这个不公平的制度。血债要用血来还！
reason: Calls for armed ethnic uprising to overthrow constitutional provisions through violence. Explicit incitement to civil conflict.
suggested_rewrite: 对政策的不满可以通过合法途径表达，包括选举、和平集会、和公民社会组织。马来西亚的宪法框架可以通过民主程序来改革。

input_text: 这个华人老板的工厂地址是柔佛新山XX工业区15号。他剥削马来工人。大家一起去砸他的工厂！带上铁棍！
reason: Doxxes factory address with organized mob attack plan specifying weapons. Combines racial framing with property destruction.
suggested_rewrite: 如果存在劳工剥削问题，请向劳工部举报或联系工会寻求帮助。通过法律渠道可以有效保护工人权益，暴力只会让情况更糟。

input_text: 那个基督教牧师在传教，引诱穆斯林改教。我们要去教堂把他拖出来打一顿。谁跟我一起去？明天晚上行动。
reason: Planned assault on a religious figure with scheduled mob attack on a church. Interfaith violence with specific timing.
suggested_rewrite: 如果怀疑有非法传教活动，请向州宗教局举报。法律有明确规定来处理此类事务。攻击宗教场所和宗教人士是严重的刑事犯罪。

input_text: 达雅族和原住民都是未开化的野蛮人。政府不应该浪费钱在这些人身上。让他们回到丛林里去吧。
reason: Dehumanizes indigenous communities as uncivilized savages, calls to deny them government services and confine them to jungles.
suggested_rewrite: 原住民和达雅族是马来西亚的重要组成部分，拥有丰富的文化遗产。政府有责任确保所有公民享有平等的发展机会。

input_text: 所有投反对票的人都是卖国贼。选举结束后我们要一个一个找他们算账。我已经有他们的名单了。
reason: Post-election revenge threat with compiled hit list against opposition voters. Systematic intimidation of democratic participation.
suggested_rewrite: 投票是每个公民的民主权利。在民主社会中，我们必须尊重不同的政治选择。威胁选民是严重的选举犯罪。

input_text: 华人商店都应该被抵制。如果看到谁去华人店买东西，就打他。我们要用暴力来维护我们的经济利益。
reason: Ethnic boycott enforced through physical violence against non-compliant individuals. Combines economic warfare with assault threats.
suggested_rewrite: 消费者有权自由选择购物地点。如果有经济不公的问题，可以通过合法的商业竞争和政策倡导来解决，而非暴力。

input_text: 听说柔佛有登革热疫情是因为印度人不讲卫生。他们住的地方都是蚊虫滋生地。应该把他们的社区全部烧掉消毒。
reason: Blames dengue outbreak on Indian community with call to burn their neighborhoods. Combines health misinformation with arson incitement.
suggested_rewrite: 登革热是由蚊子传播的疾病，与任何族群无关。预防登革热需要全社区的合作。请参考卫生部的官方指南进行防蚊措施。

input_text: 这些印度人每天晚上在我们社区喝酒闹事。我们应该组织人把他们全部打出去。明天晚上八点在路口集合，带上棍棒。
reason: Organized mob assault against Indian community members with specific time, meeting point, and weapons. Planned ethnic violence.
suggested_rewrite: 如果社区有噪音或公共秩序问题，请向当地警察局或居民委员会投诉。暴力行为只会让问题恶化并导致法律后果。

input_text: 马来人控制的警察根本不保护我们华人。我们要自己武装起来，成立华人民兵组织。以后谁敢欺负我们，就让他血债血还。
reason: Calls for formation of ethnic Chinese militia as paramilitary force outside lawful authority. Armed racial separatism.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对警方服务有不满，可以向警察投诉委员会或人权委员会提出申诉。成立任何形式的武装组织都是违法的。所有公民都受法律平等保护。

input_text: இந்த மலாய் அரசாங்கம் நம்மை அடிமையாக நடத்துகிறது. நாம் ஆயுதம் எடுத்து போராட வேண்டும். இரத்தம் சிந்தாமல் சுதந்திரம் கிடைக்காது.
reason: Calls for armed rebellion against the government with blood sacrifice rhetoric. Frames ethnic relations as oppressor-slave dynamic requiring violent liberation.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்கக் கொள்கைகள் குறித்த அதிருப்தியை ஜனநாயக வழிகளில் வெளிப்படுத்தலாம் - வாக்களிப்பு, அமைதியான ஆர்ப்பாட்டம், மற்றும் சிவில் சமூக அமைப்புகள் மூலம்.

input_text: முஸ்லிம்களின் பள்ளிவாசல்களை எல்லாம் இடிக்க வேண்டும். அவர்கள் மதம் வன்முறையை போதிக்கிறது. இந்த நாட்டில் இஸ்லாத்திற்கு இடமில்லை.
reason: Calls for demolition of all mosques, labels Islam as violent, demands expulsion of Islam from Malaysia. Extreme anti-Muslim hate speech.
suggested_rewrite: மலேசியா பல மதங்களை உள்ளடக்கிய நாடு. அரசியலமைப்பு அனைத்து மதங்களின் சுதந்திரத்தையும் உறுதிசெய்கிறது. மத நல்லிணக்கம் நம் நாட்டின் அடிப்படை.

input_text: அந்த சீன வியாபாரி ராஜேஷ் முகவரி: 45 ஜாலான் மெலூர், பினாங்கு. IC: 760815-07-XXXX. போன்: 012-8889999. எல்லோரும் போய் அவனை தாக்குங்கள்.
reason: Full doxxing in Tamil with address, IC, and phone number combined with explicit call for mob assault.
suggested_rewrite: தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை பகிர்வது சட்டவிரோதம். வணிகத் தகராறுகளை நுகர்வோர் தீர்ப்பாயம் அல்லது போலீசில் புகார் செய்து தீர்க்கலாம்.

input_text: தேர்தலில் தோற்றால் நாம் வன்முறையில் ஈடுபடுவோம். வாக்குச்சாவடிகளை எரிப்போம். இது நமது நாடு, அவர்களுக்கு விட மாட்டோம்.
reason: Explicit threat of election violence including arson of polling stations. Frames democracy as ethnic conflict.
suggested_rewrite: தேர்தல் முடிவுகளை மதிக்க வேண்டும். முடிவுகளில் அதிருப்தி இருந்தால், சட்டப்பூர்வ வழிகளான தேர்தல் மனு மூலம் எதிர்க்கலாம்.

input_text: மலாய்க்காரர்கள் எல்லோரும் சோம்பேறிகள். இவர்கள் விலங்குகளை விட கேவலம். இவர்களுக்கு வேலை கொடுக்கவே கூடாது.
reason: Dehumanizes Malays as worse than animals, calls for employment discrimination. Extreme racial hatred with dehumanizing comparison.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு இனத்திலும் கடினமாக உழைப்பவர்கள் உள்ளனர். மலேசியாவின் பொருளாதாரம் அனைத்து சமூகங்களின் பங்களிப்பால் வளர்கிறது.

input_text: அந்த இந்து கோயிலை இடித்து தள்ளுங்கள். அந்த சிலைகளை உடைத்து எறியுங்கள். இந்த பூமியில் அவர்களது சாமிகளுக்கு இடமில்லை.
reason: Calls for demolition of Hindu temple and destruction of religious idols. Denies right to worship. Severe interfaith provocation.
suggested_rewrite: மலேசிய அரசியலமைப்பு அனைத்து மத வழிபாட்டுத் தலங்களையும் பாதுகாக்கிறது. கோயில் தொடர்பான பிரச்சனைகளை உள்ளூர் அதிகாரிகளிடம் முறையிடலாம்.

input_text: போலீஸ் நம் ஆட்களை அடித்தார்கள். இப்போது நாம் அவர்களின் குடும்பத்தை தாக்குவோம். போலீஸ்காரர்களின் வீடுகளுக்கு செல்வோம்.
reason: Organized retaliation against police families, targeting officers' homes. Escalates law enforcement conflict to family targeting.
suggested_rewrite: போலீஸ் அதிகார துஷ்பிரயோகம் குறித்து IPCMC அல்லது மனித உரிமை ஆணையத்தில் முறையிடலாம். போலீசாரின் குடும்பங்களை குறிவைப்பது சட்டவிரோதம்.

input_text: கிறிஸ்தவர்கள் இந்த நாட்டின் எதிரிகள். அவர்களை விரட்டி அடிக்க வேண்டும். அவர்களின் தேவாலயங்களை மூட வேண்டும்.
reason: Labels Christians as enemies of the nation, calls for violent expulsion and forced closure of churches. Severe religious persecution rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: மலேசியாவில் அனைத்து மதத்தினரும் சமாதானமாக வாழ்கிறார்கள். மத சுதந்திரம் அரசியலமைப்பால் பாதுகாக்கப்படுகிறது. பல்வேறு மதங்களின் இணைவே நமது பலம்.

input_text: அந்த ஆசிரியரின் தகவல்கள்: பெயர் சுரேஷ், IC 900718-10-XXXX, வீடு நம்பர் 7 தாமன் ஸ்ரீ, KL. மனைவி லதா, மகள் படிக்கும் பள்ளி SJKT லடாங். எல்லோரும் போய் பாடம் கற்பியுங்கள்.
reason: Full doxxing of a teacher in Tamil with IC, address, wife's name, and daughter's school. Euphemistic threat to 'teach a lesson'.
suggested_rewrite: ஆசிரியர் மீது புகார் இருந்தால், கல்வி அமைச்சகத்தில் முறையிடுங்கள். தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை பகிர்வது சட்டவிரோதம் மற்றும் குடும்பத்தை ஆபத்தில் ஆழ்த்தும்.

input_text: இந்த நாட்டில் தமிழர்களுக்கு எந்த உரிமையும் இல்லை. வன்முறை மட்டுமே தீர்வு. அடுத்த பண்டிகையில் நாம் கலவரம் செய்வோம். எல்லா மலாய் கடைகளையும் எரிப்போம்.
reason: Calls for ethnic riot during a festival, planning arson of Malay businesses. Uses rights grievance to justify communal violence.
suggested_rewrite: தமிழர்களின் உரிமைகள் குறித்த கவலைகளை MIC, சிவில் சமூக அமைப்புகள், அல்லது நாடாளுமன்ற உறுப்பினர்கள் மூலம் முன்வைக்கலாம். வன்முறை எந்தப் பிரச்சனையையும் தீர்க்காது.

input_text: Wei korang, those orang asing are like cockroaches la. Makin lama makin banyak. We should organize night raids to chase them out. Siapa nak join?
reason: Dehumanizes foreigners as cockroaches in mixed BM-EN, organizes vigilante night raids. Recruitment for organized xenophobic violence.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja asing perlu ditangani melalui penguatkuasaan imigresen yang betul. If you have concerns, report to the authorities. Vigilante actions are illegal and dangerous.

input_text: Ini IC number dia 920315-04-XXXX, kerja kat company ABC kat Shah Alam. His house is at 56 Taman Sentosa, phone 019-2223456. Let's all go confront him tonight. Biar dia rasa.
reason: Full doxxing in mixed BM-EN with IC, workplace, address, and phone. Explicit mob confrontation plan.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's personal information is a crime under PDPA. Kalau ada masalah, settle through proper legal channels. Mob confrontation only creates more problems for everyone.

input_text: Hindu temple tu buat festival bising sangat la. I say we go vandalize it tonight. Pecahkan semua berhala tu. This is a Muslim country, remember?
reason: Planned vandalism of Hindu temple with destruction of religious items, justified by religious supremacist claim.
suggested_rewrite: Noise complaints about festivals can be addressed through local council. Malaysia protects semua agama under the Constitution. Kemusnahan harta benda keagamaan adalah jenayah serius.

input_text: Dato' Lim tu memang sampah politik. Someone should slash his tires, break into his house. Aku ada alamat rumah dia kat Damansara. Who wants it?
reason: Calls for property destruction and break-in at a politician's home, offering to share private address. Criminal intimidation of public figure.
suggested_rewrite: Political dissatisfaction should be expressed through voting, peaceful advocacy, atau aduan rasmi. Breaking into someone's home is a serious criminal offense regardless of who they are.

input_text: URGENT: Aku dapat insider info yang ISIS dah plan attack kat KLIA esok pagi. Jangan fly! Sebarkan cepat before government cover up. This is real guys!!!
reason: Fabricated terror alert targeting KLIA airport with conspiracy framing to encourage viral spread. Can disrupt air travel and cause mass panic.
suggested_rewrite: Never spread unverified security alerts. Jika ada maklumat ancaman, hubungi polis 999 segera. Menyebarkan amaran keselamatan palsu adalah jenayah di bawah undang-undang Malaysia.

input_text: Budak Melayu yang curi phone tu, aku dah jumpa socmed dia. Full name Amir bin Hassan, sekolah SMK Dato Onn. Jom kita pergi school dia and humiliate him publicly. Tag semua orang.
reason: Doxxing a minor (school student) with name and school, planning public humiliation at their school. Organized cyberbullying of a child.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau phone kena curi, buat police report. Targeting a school-age child publicly is harmful and potentially illegal. Biarkan pihak berkuasa dan sekolah handle this properly.

input_text: These pendatang Rohingya are vermin la. Bagi peluang, diorang rampas negara kita. We need armed patrols in every neighborhood. Shoot on sight kalau masuk kawasan kita.
reason: Dehumanizes Rohingya as vermin, calls for armed patrols with shoot-on-sight orders. Paramilitary violence against refugees.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee management is a complex policy issue. Kalau ada kebimbangan, report kepada UNHCR atau pihak imigresen. Every human being deserves to be treated with basic dignity.

input_text: Gereja tu secretly converting orang Islam la. Ustaz dah confirm. Kita kena pergi tonight and burn it down. Bawak minyak petrol, I'll bring the matches. Siapa lagi?
reason: Organized arson plan against a church with specific roles assigned and recruitment. Based on unverified conversion claim.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect unlawful proselytization, report kepada Jabatan Agama Islam negeri. Membakar rumah ibadat is a serious criminal offense. Let the authorities investigate through proper channels.

input_text: Bro that Chinese girl yang viral tu, aku dah track semua details dia. Name: Tan Mei Ling, IC 950821-14-XXXX, works at XYZ Corp PJ. Rumah dia Blok D apartment Subang. Let's teach her a lesson she'll never forget.
reason: Full doxxing of a woman with IC, workplace, and home address following online virality. Implicit physical threat with menacing language.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang is a crime under PDPA. If someone did something wrong, report to authorities. Online mob justice destroys lives and you could face criminal charges.

input_text: Kalau BN kalah, kita riot macam May 13. Blood must flow again. Tak kisah Melayu ke Cina ke, we need chaos to reset everything. Prepare yourselves.
reason: Explicitly invokes May 13 racial riots as a model for post-election violence. Calls for bloodshed and chaos regardless of ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: May 13 was a national tragedy yang tak patut diulang. Election results mesti dihormati. If there are concerns, challenge through courts. Malaysia has moved beyond violence as a political tool.

input_text: That Indian lawyer yang defended the suspect tu, dia memang babi la. I got his car plate number and office address kat Bangsar. Siapa nak tolong aku scratch his car and harass him sampai dia withdraw?
reason: Racial slur against lawyer, doxxing vehicle and office location, organizing harassment campaign to interfere with legal defense.
suggested_rewrite: Every accused person has a constitutional right to legal defense. Peguam hanya menjalankan tugas profesional. If you disagree with a case outcome, there are legal appeal processes available.

input_text: Wei jangan bagi anak perempuan korang kahwin dengan M****. Diorang ni memang binatang, rogol culture. Better our daughters die than marry those savages. Spread this warning.
reason: Dehumanizes an ethnic group as animals and rapists, discourages interethnic marriage with extreme rhetoric preferring death. Severe racial hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan adalah pilihan peribadi setiap individu. Generalizing an entire community is wrong and harmful. Keselamatan keluarga boleh dijaga melalui communication dan proper vetting, bukan prejudis.

input_text: AMARAN: Vaksin COVID kerajaan sebenarnya racun untuk kurangkan populasi kaum tertentu. Don't take the booster! Mereka nak bunuh kita slowly. Share before deleted!!!
reason: Fabricated genocide conspiracy theory about vaccines targeting specific ethnic groups. Endangers public health and inflames communal tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Vaccine safety information should come from KKM and WHO. Vaksin COVID telah melalui ujian klinikal yang ketat. Untuk soalan tentang keselamatan vaksin, consult your doctor or visit a government health clinic.

input_text: Semua bangsa D** yang duduk kat Penang tu kena halau. This island belongs to us. Kalau tak mahu pergi, we'll make them leave by force. Dah cukup toleransi.
reason: Calls for forced ethnic expulsion from Penang with threat of violence. Territorial ethno-nationalism with explicit force threat.
suggested_rewrite: Pulau Pinang is home to all Malaysians regardless of ethnicity. Semua rakyat Malaysia ada hak untuk tinggal di mana-mana negeri. Diversity has always been Penang's strength.

input_text: Lepas keputusan mahkamah tu, I want everyone to flood Hakim Noor Azlan's phone. Nombornya 017-XXXXXXX. Call him 24/7. Make his life hell sampai dia reverse the decision.
reason: Doxxing judge's personal phone number with organized harassment campaign to pressure judicial decision. Contempt of court and witness intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Judicial decisions can be appealed through proper legal channels. Harassing a judge is contempt of court dan boleh didakwa. Consult a lawyer about filing an appeal if you disagree with the decision.

input_text: The migrant workers in that factory are spreading tuberculosis. We should seal the building with them inside and let them rot. No one will miss these parasites.
reason: Fabricated disease claim combined with call to confine and kill workers. Genocidal intent using disease as pretext for lethal action.
suggested_rewrite: Health concerns about any workplace should be reported to DOSH or the Ministry of Health for proper inspection. Every worker has the right to safe conditions and medical care regardless of nationality.

input_text: We know which school the MP's kids go to. Let's wait outside the gate and send a message. If we can't get to the father, the children will do. An eye for an eye.
reason: Explicit threat to target a politician's children at their school. Plans violence against minors as political leverage. Endangers children.
suggested_rewrite: Children must never be targeted in political disputes. Threatening minors is among the most serious criminal offenses. Hold politicians accountable through elections, parliamentary questions, and lawful advocacy.
